biases_detected: recency_anchoring: scoped archive search exclusively to 20260613 prefix without checking whether sessions span midnight
authority_deference: treated all four sub-agent outputs as equally reliable without cross-checking divergent findings
completion_bias: marked tasks complete upon Write success rather than upon verified user acceptance (user_reaction=Unknown)
recommendations: Add a post-write render-check step (glow/bat) before marking synthesis tasks complete — the Bash sanity check run was good but only counted lines and headings, not prose coherence
When dispatching N parallel sub-agents for comparative analysis, include an explicit reconciliation step that surfaces inter-agent disagreements rather than merging silently

For efficacy studies with Unknown user reaction, hold calibration at 0 until reaction is observed — the current workflow has no feedback loop to validate whether the consolidated report answered the user's actual question

The underconfident count reflects missing a pre-flight check: the agent searched for project-side deliverables (MISSING paths logged) but did not halt or escalate — treating missing source data as acceptable reduces report reliability
